subject: Caterpie — small green caterpillar creature with a red-and-white striped antenna cap, perched on a dark branch in a leafy nighttime forest
description: A small green caterpillar creature with large round eyes and a distinctive red-tipped antenna perches on a dark wooden branch. The background shows dense green foliage lit by soft ambient light with a crescent moon partially visible through the leaves. The creature faces forward-right, body curled gently along the branch. The palette is dominated by warm greens and deep forest shadows, with the antenna providing a small pop of red.
foreground: green caterpillar creature on a dark branch
background: dense leafy forest at night with crescent moon
